unit.name: Object detection as classification plus localization and the R-CNN family
unit.description: Builds object detection from a single-object multitask loss to scalable multi-object pipelines based on region proposals and shared feature extraction.
unit.summary: Object detection is introduced as predicting both a category and a bounding box, so the network must output class scores together with box coordinates such as x, y, w, and h [ts=2075s] [ts=2086s] [ts=2092s]. For a single object, the lecture defines a multitask objective that combines softmax classification loss with an L2 regression loss on the box, but then explains why direct multi-object prediction or exhaustive sliding windows over all boxes quickly becomes unscalable [ts=2104s] [ts=2111s] [ts=2160s] [ts=2243s]. The remedy is region proposals: R-CNN classifies proposal crops and refines boxes, Fast R-CNN shares convolution over the whole image and reads regions from the feature map, and region proposal networks refine candidate boxes and keep top-K proposals, though the whole family is still described as computationally heavy because it effectively needs proposal generation plus classification/refinement stages [ts=2280s] [ts=2335s] [ts=2434s] [ts=2495s] [ts=2581s] [ts=2655s].

key_points.text: Object detection predicts class scores together with bounding-box coordinates (x, y, w, h).
A basic detector can be trained with a compound loss: softmax for class prediction plus L2 regression for the box.
Exhaustive sliding windows over all candidate boxes are not scalable for multi-object scenes.
Region proposals restrict computation to image regions that are likely to contain objects.
R-CNN classifies each proposed crop and refines its box, but it is slow because it reruns a CNN per proposal.
Fast R-CNN shares one convolutional pass over the full image and reads proposal regions from the feature map.
A region proposal network refines candidate boxes and keeps the top-K high-probability proposals.

kp_catalog.name: Object detection as joint classification and localization
kp_catalog.description: Detection extends classification by predicting both an object category and bounding-box coordinates for each object.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because object detection as joint classification and localization formalizes how detection extends classification by predicting both an object category and bounding-box coordinates for each object, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.

kp_catalog.name: Region proposals and the R-CNN progression
kp_catalog.description: R-CNN, Fast R-CNN, and Faster R-CNN progressively reduce detection cost by sharing features and learning proposal generation.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because region proposals and the R-CNN progression clarifies r-CNN, Fast R-CNN, and Faster R-CNN progressively reduce detection cost by sharing features and learning proposal generation, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.
